mechanics: Fixed supply of 1 000 000 000 AYLA. No mint() function. Strictly deflationary.
Transfer fee collected by taxCollector. Maximum fee permanently capped at 5%.
All fee changes subject to 24-hour timelock (initiate / execute / cancel).
taxCollector address changes subject to separate 24-hour timelock.
Anti-whale: configurable transaction and wallet size limits via LIMITS_ROLE.
Excluded addresses bypass fee and limit logic.
Built-in utilities: gas-optimized airdrop for batch distribution and token recovery.
